creator: flo@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi, this looks like a permission problem. Is it possible that the munin user is not allowed to access /home/x/... Did you set any Perl library paths? Why is it looking for Perl modules in /home/x ? 

I'm closing this issue. If this is still a problem, please reply to this email, so we can further analyze it.

Thanks
Florian
